questions.name: C - Functions: Square of difference between max and min
questions.questiontext: Inspect the code provided below. Write a single sentence that assigns to the result variable the square of the difference between the largest and the smallest of the three variables a, b, and c using only the given functions. Your answer should not contain spaces.

questions.name: C - Functions: Calculating the Hypotenuse
questions.questiontext: Inspect the code below. You need to calculate the Hypotenuse of a right-angled triangle using the Pythagorean theorem. Write a single line of code to assign the hypotenuse to result using only the provided functions. Your answer should not contain spaces.
